title: NPU nm1 LeakyReLU vec enable
hypothesis: A bounded int8 LeakyReLU op can be integrated into the fixed nm1 vec path and physically characterized as a leakyrelu-enabled NPU block, providing the correct architecture_block physical source before any later LeakyReLU mapper or terminal-output evaluation.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can we produce an accepted LeakyReLU-enabled nm1 design point with real physical metrics before any Layer 2 LeakyReLU campaign runs?
include: one bounded LeakyReLU-enabled nm1 block design/config variant
one focused Layer 1 physical sweep on that integrated design
exclude: broad nonlinear-family claims beyond bounded LeakyReLU enablement
follow_on_broad_sweep: return to Layer 2 LeakyReLU or broader terminal-family work only after this integrated physical source is accepted

expected_result.reason: the goal is to establish the first accepted leakyrelu-enabled nm1 block physical metrics
